markdownRemark.html:
📺 🐼 ⚠️

Citizens are reminded that the rectangle does not negotiate. It broadcasts. It remembers. It occasionally invites small humans and wheeled furniture into frame without filing the correct triplicate.

Should your solemn pundit face crack, do not panic. The Ministry of No Ego has secured archival footage labeled Advanced Serenity Under Duress. Study the twist. Note how gravity and filial love conspire against the necktie. This is not failure; it is curriculum.

🎭 The twist arrives on schedule. You have been warned. You have also been entertained.
